title: campyloneurum rufosquamatum
intro: Campyloneurum rufosquamatum, also known as Red-scaled Shield Fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Campyloneurum rufosquamatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
